name: empty-state
role: Reusable empty-state surface. Promoted from data-table's empty cell into a standalone primitive so any container (sidebar list, inbox, search results, gallery grid, settings sub-page) can render the same affordance. Four variants — empty (first-run, prompt to create), filtered-empty (filter yielded nothing, prompt to clear), error (load failed, prompt to retry), forbidden (no permission, prompt to request access). Three sizes — sm (inline within a small card), md (default), lg (full-page takeover). Optional illustration slot supports icon (24px), illustration (large SVG), or none.

semanticStructure: (optional) <empty-state-illustration> — slot for SVG illustration / icon / animated graphic

variants.empty: First-run / never-had-data. Heading speaks to what's missing ('No subscriptions yet'). Body explains value-prop briefly. Primary CTA invites creation ('Add your first subscription'). Optional secondary CTA ('Connect bank account').
variants.filtered-empty: Filter or search yielded zero matches. Heading is brief ('No matches'). Body acknowledges total count ('12 subscriptions total — try a different filter'). Secondary CTA clears filters; no primary CTA needed.
variants.error: Load failed. Heading names the failure ('Couldn't load subscriptions'). Body provides context (auth issue, network, service status). Primary CTA is Retry; optional secondary links to status page. Heading uses role='alert' so AT announces.
variants.forbidden: User lacks permissions for the requested resource. Heading is brief ('You don't have access'). Body explains who can grant ('Ask the workspace admin'). Primary CTA may be 'Request access'; secondary 'Back to home'.

sizes.sm: Inline within a small card or list. Heading at type-size-md (not lg); padding compact. Used in sidebar empty lists, inline-empty cards.
sizes.md: Default. Heading at type-size-lg. Padding section/card. The 80% choice.
sizes.lg: Full-page takeover. Heading at type-size-2xl. Padding full-page. Used as page-level empty state when an entire surface has no content.

illustrationModes.icon: Single SVG icon at 48px. Most common. Tone-appropriate colour (text-disabled / critical / warning).
illustrationModes.illustration: Large SVG illustration (up to 200px tall). Used in lg-size full-page empty states. Should respect prefers-reduced-motion if animated.
illustrationModes.none: No illustration. Used when context makes the empty state obvious (e.g., inline within an already-illustrated container).

ariaPatterns.regionLabel: <div role='region' aria-labelledby='<heading-id>'> — gives the empty-state a named landmark.
ariaPatterns.errorAriaAlert: Error-variant heading wraps in role='alert' so AT announces 'Couldn't load…' on first paint.
ariaPatterns.filteredEmptyAriaLive: Filtered-empty heading is inside aria-live='polite' region (set on the parent container) so AT announces 'No matches' when the filter applies.
ariaPatterns.iconAriaHidden: Decorative illustrations / icons are aria-hidden='true'. Heading + body carry the meaning.

name: empty-state-illustration
role: Visual slot in the empty-state. Renders an SVG illustration (large), icon (48px), or animated graphic. Always aria-hidden — the surrounding heading + body carry the message. Sizing is governed by the parent's data-size attribute.

meta.alwaysAriaHidden: Always aria-hidden='true'. The heading + body carry semantic meaning; the illustration is visual reinforcement.
meta.tonePicking: Match the parent variant's tone: empty → neutral, filtered-empty → neutral, error → critical, forbidden → warning.

name: empty-state-heading
role: Heading element inside the empty-state. Auto-selects h2/h3/h4 based on the parent size + page context. Carries the id that the parent's aria-labelledby points to. Error-variant heading wraps in role='alert' for immediate AT announcement.

meta.headingLevelGuidance: Default to h3 (matches the most common nesting context — empty-state inside a page section). Use h2 for full-page lg-size empty states. Use h4 if the empty-state is nested inside an already-h3'd container.
meta.errorVariantRoleAlert: When parent variant='error', wrap the heading text in <span role='alert'> so AT announces it on first paint.

name: empty-state-body
role: Supporting prose below the heading. 1-2 sentences explaining context or value-prop. Max ~48 characters per line via inline max-width.

copyGuidelines: Acknowledge the absence ('12 subscriptions total — try a different filter' rather than just 'No matches').
Suggest the next action when relevant ('Use a different search term' / 'Try changing the date range').
Be specific and grounded — don't say 'Something went wrong'; say 'Couldn't reach galley.harrow.haus'.

name: empty-state-actions
role: CTA cluster at the bottom of the empty-state. Composes <action-button> from pattern-button-system. Typical pattern: 1 primary action + 1 optional secondary. For error variant: 1 primary (Retry) + 1 secondary (View status). For filtered-empty: 1 secondary action (Clear filters) — no primary needed.

registers.primary-only: Single primary CTA. Used for empty variant ('Add first subscription') and forbidden variant ('Request access').
registers.primary-plus-secondary: Primary + secondary alongside. Used for empty variant when there's a backup path ('Add manually' + 'Connect bank account') or error variant ('Retry' + 'View status').
registers.secondary-only: Ghost-intent button only. Used for filtered-empty variant ('Clear filters') — no primary because the user already has data, the filter just hid it.
